text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Umarathon runner registration staff"...<n>Ah, looks
like it would overlap with<n>practice time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Production line at a carrot plant"...<n>"Cleat quality
inspection"... Hmm,<n>wouldn't want stiff shoulders
with a race<n>coming up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! "Short-Term OK! Delivering<n>Packages and
Smiles: UmaExpress,<n>Temporary Courier." This is
it! It'll even<n>double as training—two birds with one<n>
stone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I might even be able to<n>afford a trip
to the amusement park as<n>next month's treat for
my sisters! ♪ Big<n>sister's got work to do!
